keyRisks: CTO (Sørensen) is the highest single people-linked EV exposure (~$26M) and a top-decile flight risk on a single-threaded cyber/cloud platform
CRO (Halvorsen) is behind plan on the thesis-critical recurring-revenue motion — the one red workstream (~$9M EV drag)
CFO (Balakrishnan) carries key-person risk on lender + integration-accounting relationships with no finance bench
portcoSummary.headline: Strong operating core (CEO, COO, CTO) tracking the thesis, but two acute people risks: a top-decile CTO flight risk on ~$26M of EV and a CRO behind on the recurring-revenue conversion that is the red workstream.

executives.name: Priya Balakrishnan

keyRisks: Single point of failure on lender + integration-accounting relationships
executives.additionalComments: Technically excellent finance leader; high-potential is gated by delegation runway, not ability. Key-person risk with no number two in finance today.

actionability.recommendation: Open VP Finance search immediately; force relationship documentation/transfer; retention grant

evidence.finding: CFO concedes the 12-day close slipped again this quarter and the lender noticed — a covenant- and integration-timing risk.
evidence.quote: Our close took 12 days again this quarter and the lender noticed.
evidence.speaker: P. Balakrishnan

evidence.finding: A peer confirms everything routes through Priya — reporting stops if she is out, evidencing zero bench.

executives.name: Anika Sørensen
keyRisks: Flight risk on the platform's architect; fielded an external approach this quarter
Thin bench; ~$26M of EV rides on the single-threaded cyber-attach platform she owns
executives.additionalComments: Owns the cloud + security platform — the brightest spot in the thesis (cyber attach ahead of plan). The highest-priority retention risk in the portfolio; scaling people-leadership is the soft spot vs the future-state target.

actionability.recommendation: Close a market-rate retention + equity package this quarter; backfill a deputy architect to reduce single-threading

evidence.finding: An external CISO advisor warns Sørensen is top-decile and heavily recruited — retention depends on paying her like she is irreplaceable.
evidence.quote: She's top-decile and the market knows it. You'll get two years if you pay her like she's irreplaceable.

evidence.finding: A direct report confirms too much of the platform lives in her head — single-threading would be felt immediately if she left.
evidence.quote: Too much of the platform lives in her head; if she left we'd feel it immediately.

derisicingQuestions: Is the retention + equity package competitive enough to hold her two years?
How quickly can a deputy architect de-single-thread the platform?
suggestedActions: Close a market-rate retention + equity package this quarter
riskMitigations: Retention + equity package in negotiation; deputy-architect search opening
